channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Chris Mason: Decision to appoint Mandelson continues to inflict damage

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How I ended up in the Mandelson files

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Mandelson criticised Starmer’s lack of ‘verve’ and tendency to buckle under pressure

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
